subtitle: Build a multi-level document approval system with customizable workflows, notifications, and audit trail
boss_tip: Start with a single approval type (like purchase requests) and get the multi-level routing working. Once the core workflow engine is solid, adding more document types is just configuration.
prompt_body:
你是一位专业的全栈开发工程师。请为「{{company_name}}」构建一套完整的文档审批流程系统，取代纸质审批流程。

## 技术栈
- Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui 组件库
- Supabase（PostgreSQL + Auth + RLS + Storage）
- Resend（邮件通知）
- Vercel 部署

## 数据库结构（Supabase PostgreSQL）

请按以下顺序建立所有表格，并加上 RLS 策略：

sql
-- 部门表
create table departments (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,
  name_en text,
  manager_id uuid references auth.users(id),
  parent_id uuid references departments(id),
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- 员工档案表
create table employees (
  id uuid primary key references auth.users(id),
  full_name text not null,
  email text not null,
  department_id uuid references departments(id),
  position text,
  approver_level int default 0,
  is_admin boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on employees(department_id);

-- 文档类型表
create table document_types (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,
  name_en text,
  code text unique not null,
  description text,
  requires_attachment boolean default false,
  is_active boolean default true,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- 审批流程配置表（按金额区间定义审批层级）
create table approval_workflows (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  document_type_id uuid references document_types(id),
  amount_min numeric default 0,
  amount_max numeric,
  levels int not null default 1,
  level1_role text,
  level2_role text,
  level3_role text,
  auto_approve_below numeric default 0,
  escalation_hours int default 48,
  is_active boolean default true,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on approval_workflows(document_type_id);

-- 审批申请主表
create table approval_requests (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_no text unique not null,
  document_type_id uuid references document_types(id),
  requester_id uuid references employees(id),
  title text not null,
  description text,
  amount numeric,
  currency text default 'MYR',
  priority text default 'normal' check (priority in ('low','normal','high','urgent')),
  status text default 'pending' check (status in ('draft','pending','approved','rejected','cancelled','recalled')),
  current_level int default 1,
  total_levels int default 1,
  workflow_id uuid references approval_workflows(id),
  submitted_at timestamptz,
  completed_at timestamptz,
  rejection_reason text,
  metadata jsonb default '{}',
  created_at timestamptz default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on approval_requests(requester_id);
create index on approval_requests(status);
create index on approval_requests(document_type_id);

-- 审批步骤表（每一层的状态）
create table approval_steps (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id) on delete cascade,
  level int not null,
  approver_id uuid references employees(id),
  delegate_id uuid references employees(id),
  status text default 'pending' check (status in ('pending','approved','rejected','delegated','escalated','skipped')),
  comments text,
  acted_at timestamptz,
  due_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on approval_steps(request_id);
create index on approval_steps(approver_id);
create index on approval_steps(status);

-- 附件表
create table attachments (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id) on delete cascade,
  file_name text not null,
  file_url text not null,
  file_size int,
  mime_type text,
  uploaded_by uuid references employees(id),
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on attachments(request_id);

-- 讨论留言表
create table request_comments (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id) on delete cascade,
  author_id uuid references employees(id),
  content text not null,
  is_internal boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on request_comments(request_id);

-- 通知表
create table notifications (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  recipient_id uuid references employees(id),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id),
  type text not null,
  title text not null,
  body text,
  is_read boolean default false,
  sent_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on notifications(recipient_id);
create index on notifications(is_read);

-- 审计追踪表
create table audit_logs (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id),
  actor_id uuid references employees(id),
  action text not null,
  old_data jsonb,
  new_data jsonb,
  ip_address text,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on audit_logs(request_id);


## 核心功能

### 1. 可配置的审批流程引擎

根据文档类型和金额区间自动选择审批层级：
- 金额 < RM5,000：1 层审批（部门主管）
- 金额 RM5,000–50,000：2 层审批（部门主管 → 财务主管）
- 金额 > RM50,000：3 层审批（部门主管 → 财务主管 → 总监）
- 低于自动审批门槛的申请直接通过

请在 `src/lib/workflow-engine.ts` 建立工作流引擎，包含以下函数：
- `resolveWorkflow(documentTypeId, amount)` — 返回对应的 approval_workflow 配置
- `createApprovalSteps(requestId, workflow)` — 建立各层审批步骤并指派审批人
- `advanceWorkflow(requestId, stepId, action, comments)` — 处理审批动作，推进到下一层
- `checkEscalation()` — cron job 逻辑，超时未处理则自动上报

### 2. 文档提交表单

建立 `src/components/request-form.tsx`（Client Component）：
- 动态表单，根据文档类型「{{document_types}}」显示不同字段
- 金额输入（RM）实时显示预计审批层级
- 多文件上传至 Supabase Storage
- 优先级选择（普通 / 紧急）
- 草稿自动储存

### 3. 审批人收件箱

建立 `src/app/inbox/page.tsx`（Server Component + Client 互动）：
- 左栏：待审批列表，显示文档类型、标题、申请人、金额、提交日期、优先级
- 右栏：文档详情 + 审批链条可视化（Stepper 组件）
- 一键批准 / 拒绝（带必填拒绝原因）
- 批量审批功能
- 移动端友好，审批人可在手机上操作

### 4. 审批链条可视化

建立 `src/components/approval-stepper.tsx`：
- 显示所有审批层级（共「{{approval_levels}}」层）
- 每层显示：审批人姓名、职位、状态图标、审批时间和意见
- 当前待审批层高亮显示
- 已完成层显示绿色勾号，拒绝层显示红色叉号

### 5. 委托审批功能

- 审批人可将审批权委托给其他员工（设定生效日期和到期日期）
- 委托期间，被委托人的收件箱会显示该申请
- 系统记录「由 XXX 代为审批」的说明

### 6. 自动上报机制

建立 Supabase Edge Function `escalate-overdue`（每小时执行一次）：
- 检查所有超过 `escalation_hours` 未处理的步骤
- 自动标记为「已上报」并通知上级
- 发送提醒邮件给原审批人和其主管

### 7. 通知系统

以下事件触发通知（站内通知 + 邮件）：
- 文档提交 → 通知第一层审批人
- 每层审批通过 → 通知下一层审批人
- 全部审批通过 → 通知申请人
- 任一层拒绝 → 通知申请人（附拒绝原因）
- 申请人退回修改再提交 → 通知审批链所有人重置

### 8. 审计追踪

每一个动作（提交、审批、拒绝、委托、撤回）都记录到 `audit_logs`，包含操作人、时间、变更内容和 IP 地址。

## 页面结构


/                    — 仪表盘（待我审批、我提交的、今日已审批统计）
/inbox               — 审批收件箱
/requests            — 我提交的申请
/requests/new        — 新建申请
/requests/[id]       — 申请详情
/admin/workflows     — 审批流程配置（管理员）
/admin/reports       — 分析报表


## 仪表盘数据卡片

- 待我审批（数量 + 最旧一份等待天数）
- 我提交的进行中（显示当前卡在第几层）
- 今日已审批（本人处理的数量）
- 平均审批时长（过去 30 天）
- 瓶颈分析（哪个审批人最常造成延误）

## 设计规范

- 深色导航栏（#0F172A）+ 白色内容区
- 黄色按钮（#FCD34D）用于主要操作（提交、批准）
- 状态徽章：待审批（蓝）、已批准（绿）、已拒绝（红）、草稿（灰）
- 优先级徽章：普通（灰）、高（橙）、紧急（红色闪烁）
- 字体：Inter（英文）+ Noto Sans SC（中文）
- 公司名称「{{company_name}}」显示在导航栏
- 部门：「{{departments}}」

## 安全与 RLS

- 员工只能查看自己提交的申请或指派给自己的审批步骤
- 管理员可查看所有记录
- 所有写操作通过 Server Actions 完成
- RLS 策略的 `auth.uid()` 包裹在 `(select auth.uid())` 内提升性能

## 交付物

请提供：
1. 完整的 SQL migration 文件（含 RLS 策略和 indexes）
2. 所有页面和组件的完整代码
3. `workflow-engine.ts` 核心逻辑
4. Supabase Edge Function（自动上报）
5. `.env.local.example` 文件
6. 简单的系统设置说明（如何配置不同文档类型的审批流程）

请确保所有代码可以直接在 Vercel 上部署，并附上必要的环境变量说明。
prompt_body_en:
You are an expert full-stack developer. Build a complete Document Approval Workflow System for "{{company_name}}" that replaces paper-based approval processes.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + RLS + Storage)
- Resend (email notifications)
- Vercel deployment

## Database Schema

Create all tables in order with RLS policies enabled:

sql
-- Departments
create table departments (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,
  manager_id uuid references auth.users(id),
  parent_id uuid references departments(id),
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- Employee profiles
create table employees (
  id uuid primary key references auth.users(id),
  full_name text not null,
  email text not null,
  department_id uuid references departments(id),
  position text,
  approver_level int default 0,
  is_admin boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on employees(department_id);

-- Document types
create table document_types (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,
  code text unique not null,
  description text,
  requires_attachment boolean default false,
  is_active boolean default true,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- Workflow configuration (amount-based routing rules)
create table approval_workflows (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  document_type_id uuid references document_types(id),
  amount_min numeric default 0,
  amount_max numeric,
  levels int not null default 1,
  level1_role text,
  level2_role text,
  level3_role text,
  auto_approve_below numeric default 0,
  escalation_hours int default 48,
  is_active boolean default true,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on approval_workflows(document_type_id);

-- Approval requests (the actual documents)
create table approval_requests (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_no text unique not null,
  document_type_id uuid references document_types(id),
  requester_id uuid references employees(id),
  title text not null,
  description text,
  amount numeric,
  currency text default 'MYR',
  priority text default 'normal' check (priority in ('low','normal','high','urgent')),
  status text default 'pending' check (status in ('draft','pending','approved','rejected','cancelled','recalled')),
  current_level int default 1,
  total_levels int default 1,
  workflow_id uuid references approval_workflows(id),
  submitted_at timestamptz,
  completed_at timestamptz,
  rejection_reason text,
  metadata jsonb default '{}',
  created_at timestamptz default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on approval_requests(requester_id);
create index on approval_requests(status);
create index on approval_requests(document_type_id);

-- Approval steps (one row per level per request)
create table approval_steps (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id) on delete cascade,
  level int not null,
  approver_id uuid references employees(id),
  delegate_id uuid references employees(id),
  status text default 'pending' check (status in ('pending','approved','rejected','delegated','escalated','skipped')),
  comments text,
  acted_at timestamptz,
  due_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on approval_steps(request_id);
create index on approval_steps(approver_id);
create index on approval_steps(status);

-- Attachments
create table attachments (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id) on delete cascade,
  file_name text not null,
  file_url text not null,
  file_size int,
  mime_type text,
  uploaded_by uuid references employees(id),
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on attachments(request_id);

-- Comments and discussion thread
create table request_comments (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id) on delete cascade,
  author_id uuid references employees(id),
  content text not null,
  is_internal boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on request_comments(request_id);

-- In-app notifications
create table notifications (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  recipient_id uuid references employees(id),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id),
  type text not null,
  title text not null,
  body text,
  is_read boolean default false,
  sent_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on notifications(recipient_id);
create index on notifications(is_read);

-- Full audit trail
create table audit_logs (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  request_id uuid references approval_requests(id),
  actor_id uuid references employees(id),
  action text not null,
  old_data jsonb,
  new_data jsonb,
  ip_address text,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index on audit_logs(request_id);


## Business Rules — Amount-Based Routing

Apply these routing rules automatically when a request is submitted:
- Amount < RM 5,000: 1 approval level (Department Head)
- Amount RM 5,000–50,000: 2 approval levels (Department Head → Finance Manager)
- Amount > RM 50,000: 3 approval levels (Department Head → Finance Manager → Director)
- Below auto-approve threshold: skip all levels, mark as approved immediately
- Document types: {{document_types}}
- Max approval levels: {{approval_levels}}
- Departments: {{departments}}

## Core Workflow Engine

Create `src/lib/workflow-engine.ts` with these functions:

1. `resolveWorkflow(documentTypeId, amount)` — query approval_workflows, match the correct tier, return config
2. `createApprovalSteps(requestId, workflow, submitterId)` — insert rows into approval_steps for each level, assign approvers by role, set due_at based on escalation_hours
3. `advanceWorkflow(requestId, stepId, action, comments, actorId)` — mark current step approved/rejected, if approved and more levels remain advance current_level and activate next step, if final level mark request approved, if rejected mark request rejected and notify requester
4. `recallRequest(requestId, requesterId)` — allow requester to recall a pending request before it is acted on
5. `resubmitRequest(requestId, requesterId, updates)` — after rejection, allow requester to edit and resubmit, reset all steps

## Features to Build

### Approval Inbox (`/inbox`)
- Split-pane layout: left list of pending items, right detail panel
- Each list row: document type badge, title, requester name, amount (RM), submitted date, priority badge
- Detail panel: full form data, attachments list, approval chain stepper, comment thread
- One-click Approve button (yellow) and Reject button (red, requires reason)
- Batch approve: select multiple rows and approve all at once
- Mobile-responsive: stack to single column on small screens so approvers can act from phone

### Approval Chain Stepper (`src/components/approval-stepper.tsx`)
- Vertical stepper showing all {{approval_levels}} levels
- Each node: approver avatar/initials, name, position, status icon, timestamp, comments
- Current active level highlighted with pulse animation
- Completed levels: green checkmark; rejected level: red X; pending levels: grey circle

### Request Submission Form (`src/components/request-form.tsx`)
- Document type selector triggers dynamic field rendering
- Amount field with RM prefix; below the field show real-time preview: "This request requires N approval levels"
- Multi-file upload to Supabase Storage (PDF, images, max 10 MB each)
- Priority selector: Normal / High / Urgent
- Auto-save draft to localStorage every 30 seconds
- Submit triggers workflow resolution and step creation via Server Action

### Delegation
- Employee settings page: delegate approval authority to a colleague for a date range
- When delegation is active, delegated requests appear in delegate's inbox with a "Delegating for [Name]" label
- Audit log records "Approved by [Delegate] on behalf of [Original Approver]"

### Auto-Escalation (Supabase Edge Function)
- Cron: every hour, check approval_steps where status = 'pending' and due_at < now()
- Mark overdue steps as 'escalated', send email to approver and their manager
- Dashboard surfaces escalated requests with an orange warning badge

### Notifications
Trigger in-app notification + email (via Resend) for:
- Submission → notify level 1 approver
- Each level approved → notify next level approver
- Final approval → notify requester
- Any rejection → notify requester with reason
- Resubmission → notify all approvers in chain that request has been revised
- Escalation → notify approver and their manager

### Dashboard (`/`)
Display summary cards:
- Pending My Approval (count + oldest waiting days)
- Submitted by Me In Progress (count + current level stuck on)
- Approved Today (count)
- Average Approval Time — last 30 days in hours
- Bottleneck Table: top 5 approvers by average hold time
Use Supabase RPC functions for aggregation queries.

### Admin — Workflow Configuration (`/admin/workflows`)
- Table listing all document types with their routing rules
- Edit modal: set amount tiers, assign approver roles per level, set escalation hours, set auto-approve threshold
- Changes take effect on new submissions only (existing requests keep original workflow snapshot)

### Admin — Reports (`/admin/reports`)
- Filter by date range, department, document type
- Metrics: total submitted, approval rate, average cycle time, rejection reasons breakdown
- Export to CSV

## Page Structure

/                        Dashboard
/inbox                   Approver inbox
/requests                My submitted requests
/requests/new            Submit new request
/requests/[id]           Request detail + audit trail
/admin/workflows         Workflow configuration
/admin/reports           Analytics and export


## Security & RLS
- Employees can only read their own requests or steps assigned to them
- Admins (is_admin = true) can read all records
- All mutations go through Server Actions (never expose service key to client)
- Wrap all RLS policy auth.uid() calls as (select auth.uid()) for performance
- Rate-limit the submission endpoint: max 20 requests per employee per day

## UI Design
- Dark navbar (#0F172A) + white content area
- Yellow (#FCD34D) for primary actions: Submit, Approve
- Status badges: Pending (blue), Approved (green), Rejected (red), Draft (grey), Escalated (orange)
- Priority badges: Normal (grey), High (orange), Urgent (red with pulse)
- Fonts: Inter (Latin) + Noto Sans SC (CJK) via next/font
- Company name "{{company_name}}" in navbar
- Currency: RM (Malaysian Ringgit) throughout

## Deliverables
1. Complete SQL migration file with all tables, indexes, and RLS policies
2. All pages and components with full TypeScript code
3. `src/lib/workflow-engine.ts` with all workflow functions
4. Supabase Edge Function for auto-escalation cron job
5. Server Actions for all mutations (submit, approve, reject, delegate, recall, resubmit)
6. `.env.local.example` with all required environment variables
7. Seed script with sample document types, workflows, departments, and employees for testing

subtitle: Build a complete vendor management system with supplier database, purchase orders, and performance tracking

prompt_body:
你是一位资深全栈开发工程师，精通 Next.js 14、Tailwind CSS、Supabase 和 shadcn/ui。请帮我为马来西亚中小型制造业或贸易公司「{{company_name}}」构建一套完整的供应商管理系统，取代目前依赖 Excel 手动追踪供应商、采购订单和付款记录的方式。

【系统目标】
让采购团队能够集中管理所有供应商资料、发出及追踪采购订单、评估供应商表现，并产生付款账龄报告，提升采购效率与议价能力。

【技术栈】
- 前端框架：Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- 样式：Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui（new-york 风格，浅色模式）
- 数据库：Supabase（PostgreSQL + Row Level Security）
- 文件存储：Supabase Storage
- 图表：Recharts 或 Chart.js
- 字体：Inter + Noto Sans SC（中文支持）

【数据库设计】
请建立以下数据表，附带完整栏位、类型、约束及索引：

1. vendor_categories（供应商类别）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - name varchar(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE
   - name_en varchar(100)
   - description text
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()

2. vendors（供应商主档）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - company_name varchar(200) NOT NULL
   - company_name_en varchar(200)
   - ssm_number varchar(20) UNIQUE（马来西亚公司注册号）
   - sst_number varchar(20)（消费税注册号）
   - category_id uuid REFERENCES vendor_categories(id)
   - address text
   - city varchar(100)
   - state varchar(50)
   - postcode varchar(10)
   - country varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Malaysia'
   - website varchar(255)
   - bank_name varchar(100)
   - bank_account_number varchar(50)
   - bank_account_name varchar(200)
   - payment_terms varchar(50)（如：Net 30、COD）
   - credit_limit numeric(12,2)
   - currency varchar(10) DEFAULT '{{currency}}'
   - status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'active'（active / inactive / blacklisted）
   - is_preferred boolean DEFAULT false
   - onboarding_completed boolean DEFAULT false
   - notes text
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - INDEX: category_id, status

3. vendor_contacts（供应商联系人）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
   - name varchar(100) NOT NULL
   - position varchar(100)
   - email varchar(255)
   - phone varchar(30)
   - whatsapp varchar(30)
   - is_primary boolean DEFAULT false
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - INDEX: vendor_id

4. purchase_orders（采购订单）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - po_number varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE（自动生成，如 PO-2024-0001）
   - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id)
   - status varchar(30) DEFAULT 'draft'（draft / sent / acknowledged / partial_delivery / delivered / invoiced / paid / cancelled）
   - order_date date NOT NULL
   - expected_delivery_date date
   - actual_delivery_date date
   - subtotal numeric(14,2)
   - tax_amount numeric(14,2)
   - total_amount numeric(14,2)
   - currency varchar(10) DEFAULT '{{currency}}'
   - payment_terms varchar(50)
   - payment_due_date date
   - payment_date date
   - delivery_address text
   - remarks text
   - approved_by varchar(100)
   - approved_at timestamptz
   - created_by varchar(100)
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - INDEX: vendor_id, status, order_date, payment_due_date

5. po_items（采购订单明细）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - po_id uuid REFERENCES purchase_orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
   - item_code varchar(50)
   - description varchar(500) NOT NULL
   - unit varchar(50)
   - quantity numeric(12,3) NOT NULL
   - unit_price numeric(12,4) NOT NULL
   - discount_pct numeric(5,2) DEFAULT 0
   - line_total numeric(14,2) NOT NULL
   - delivered_qty numeric(12,3) DEFAULT 0
   - notes text
   - INDEX: po_id

6. deliveries（收货记录）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - po_id uuid REFERENCES purchase_orders(id)
   - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id)
   - delivery_date date NOT NULL
   - do_number varchar(100)（送货单号）
   - invoice_number varchar(100)
   - status varchar(30)（on_time / late / partial / rejected）
   - quality_issue boolean DEFAULT false
   - quality_notes text
   - received_by varchar(100)
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - INDEX: po_id, vendor_id, delivery_date

7. vendor_ratings（供应商评分）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id)
   - period varchar(20)（如：2024-Q1）
   - delivery_score numeric(3,1)（满分 5，基于准时率）
   - quality_score numeric(3,1)（满分 5，人工录入）
   - pricing_score numeric(3,1)（满分 5，基于价格竞争力）
   - responsiveness_score numeric(3,1)（满分 5，人工录入）
   - overall_score numeric(3,1)（加权平均）
   - notes text
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - UNIQUE: (vendor_id, period)
   - INDEX: vendor_id

8. price_lists（供应商报价）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id)
   - item_code varchar(50)
   - description varchar(500) NOT NULL
   - unit varchar(50)
   - unit_price numeric(12,4) NOT NULL
   - currency varchar(10) DEFAULT '{{currency}}'
   - min_order_qty numeric(12,3)
   - effective_date date
   - expiry_date date
   - is_active boolean DEFAULT true
   - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - INDEX: vendor_id, item_code, is_active

9. vendor_documents（供应商文件）
   - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
   - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id)
   - doc_type varchar(50)（ssm_cert / sst_cert / halal_cert / insurance / contract / other）
   - doc_name varchar(255) NOT NULL
   - file_url text
   - expiry_date date
   - uploaded_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
   - INDEX: vendor_id, doc_type

10. payment_records（付款记录）
    - id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
    - po_id uuid REFERENCES purchase_orders(id)
    - vendor_id uuid REFERENCES vendors(id)
    - amount numeric(14,2) NOT NULL
    - payment_date date NOT NULL
    - payment_method varchar(50)（bank_transfer / cheque / online）
    - reference_number varchar(100)
    - notes text
    - created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
    - INDEX: po_id, vendor_id, payment_date

【核心功能模块】

1. 供应商数据库（/vendors）
   - 卡片式列表，显示公司名称、类别、评分星级、活跃采购订单数、年度总采购额
   - 详情页：完整公司资料（SSM 号、SST 号、银行资料）、联系人列表、文件清单、采购历史
   - 新增 / 编辑供应商表单，含入驻核查清单（SSM 证书、银行资料、联系人等必填项）
   - 状态管理：活跃 / 停用 / 列入黑名单，附原因备注

2. 采购订单管理（/purchase-orders）
   - 创建 PO 时自动生成编号（PO-YYYY-NNNN）
   - 状态流转时间线：草稿 → 已发送 → 已确认 → 已收货 → 已开票 → 已付款
   - 行项目支持搜索已有商品编码，自动带入最新报价
   - 审批工作流：金额超过设定阈值时需要主管审批
   - 一键发送 PO 至供应商（邮件或 WhatsApp 链接）
   - PDF 导出功能，含公司抬头

3. 收货与交货追踪
   - 逾期未交货自动标记为红色警示
   - 记录实际收货日期，系统自动计算是否准时
   - 支持部分收货，追踪每项商品的已收 / 未收数量
   - 质量问题标记与备注

4. 供应商绩效评分
   - 准时交货率：系统自动计算（准时次数 ÷ 总次数 × 5）
   - 质量评分、响应速度：采购人员手动录入（每季度评估）
   - 价格竞争力：基于同类商品报价对比自动计算
   - 综合评分公式：准时率 40% + 质量 30% + 价格 20% + 响应 10%
   - 雷达图可视化展示四个维度

5. 跨供应商价格对比
   - 输入商品编码或名称，显示所有供应商的最新报价对比表
   - 标注最低价、最优综合评分供应商
   - 历史价格走势图

6. 付款管理与账龄报告
   - 未付款 PO 列表，按到期日排序
   - 账龄分析：0-30天 / 31-60天 / 61-90天 / 90天以上
   - 付款记录录入，支持批量标记已付款
   - 每月供应商对账报告

7. 仪表板（/dashboard）
   - 关键指标卡片：供应商总数、本月活跃 PO 数、待收货数量、逾期数量
   - 按类别的年度采购金额堆叠柱形图
   - 前十大供应商采购额排名
   - 近 12 个月交货准时率趋势折线图
   - 付款账龄分布饼图
   - 需要关注的警示列表（逾期交货、即将到期合同、评分低于 3 分的供应商）

【UI/UX 设计要求】
- 顶部导航栏：深色背景（#0F172A），左侧显示「{{company_name}} 采购系统」，右侧显示供应商入口链接
- 供应商卡片：白色底、细边框、圆角，评分使用黄色（#FCD34D）星星图标
- 状态徽章：使用颜色区分（绿色=活跃、灰色=停用、红色=黑名单）
- PO 状态时间线：水平步骤条，当前状态高亮黄色
- 数据表格：条纹行、悬停高亮，金额右对齐
- 移动端友好：供应商卡片和 PO 列表在手机上可正常查看
- 货币格式：马来西亚令吉（RM）格式，千位分隔符
- 所有日期使用马来西亚格式（DD/MM/YYYY）

【业务逻辑】
- 供应商类别为「{{vendor_categories}}」，系统初始化时预填入
- 付款条件选项为「{{payment_terms}}」
- PO 付款到期日 = 收货日 + 账期天数，系统自动计算
- 若实际交货日超过预期交货日超过 3 天，自动将此次交货标记为「迟延」
- 供应商综合评分低于 3.0 分时，在列表中显示警告图标并发送通知
- 优先供应商标记（星号图标）在创建 PO 时优先推荐

请先建立数据库 migration 文件（SQL），然后逐模块构建功能，从供应商数据库和采购订单功能开始，测试通过后再加入绩效评分和报表功能。
prompt_body_en:
You are a senior full-stack engineer proficient in Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, and shadcn/ui. Build a complete Vendor & Supplier Management System for a Malaysian manufacturing or trading SME called {{company_name}}. This system replaces Excel-based supplier tracking and centralises vendor profiles, purchase orders, delivery records, performance scoring, and payment tracking.

## Role & Context
Target users are procurement staff at Malaysian SMEs. They need to onboard vendors, raise purchase orders, track deliveries, compare prices across suppliers, and produce payment aging reports. All monetary values are in {{currency}} (Malaysian Ringgit). Business context includes SSM registration numbers, SST (Sales and Service Tax), Sdn Bhd company structures, and local payment norms.

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (new-york style, light mode)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Row Level Security)
- File Storage: Supabase Storage (vendor documents)
- Charts: Recharts
- Fonts: Inter + Noto Sans SC (for Chinese UI labels)

## Database Schema
Create a full SQL migration file with all tables, columns, types, constraints, and indexes.

### Tables

**vendor_categories** — id uuid PK, name varchar(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL, name_en varchar(100), description text, created_at timestamptz.

**vendors** — id uuid PK, company_name varchar(200) NOT NULL, company_name_en varchar(200), ssm_number varchar(20) UNIQUE, sst_number varchar(20), category_id uuid FK→vendor_categories, address text, city varchar(100), state varchar(50), postcode varchar(10), country varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Malaysia', website varchar(255), bank_name varchar(100), bank_account_number varchar(50), bank_account_name varchar(200), payment_terms varchar(50), credit_limit numeric(12,2), currency varchar(10) DEFAULT 'MYR', status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'active' (active/inactive/blacklisted), is_preferred boolean DEFAULT false, onboarding_completed boolean DEFAULT false, notes text, created_at/updated_at timestamptz. Index: category_id, status.

**vendor_contacts** — id uuid PK, vendor_id uuid FK→vendors CASCADE, name varchar(100) NOT NULL, position varchar(100), email varchar(255), phone varchar(30), whatsapp varchar(30), is_primary boolean DEFAULT false, created_at timestamptz. Index: vendor_id.

**purchase_orders** — id uuid PK, po_number varchar(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL (auto-generated: PO-YYYY-NNNN), vendor_id uuid FK→vendors, status varchar(30) DEFAULT 'draft' (draft/sent/acknowledged/partial_delivery/delivered/invoiced/paid/cancelled), order_date date NOT NULL, expected_delivery_date date, actual_delivery_date date, subtotal numeric(14,2), tax_amount numeric(14,2), total_amount numeric(14,2), currency varchar(10) DEFAULT 'MYR', payment_terms varchar(50), payment_due_date date, payment_date date, delivery_address text, remarks text, approved_by varchar(100), approved_at timestamptz, created_by varchar(100), created_at/updated_at timestamptz. Index: vendor_id, status, order_date, payment_due_date.

**po_items** — id uuid PK, po_id uuid FK→purchase_orders CASCADE, item_code varchar(50), description varchar(500) NOT NULL, unit varchar(50), quantity numeric(12,3) NOT NULL, unit_price numeric(12,4) NOT NULL, discount_pct numeric(5,2) DEFAULT 0, line_total numeric(14,2) NOT NULL, delivered_qty numeric(12,3) DEFAULT 0, notes text. Index: po_id.

**deliveries** — id uuid PK, po_id uuid FK→purchase_orders, vendor_id uuid FK→vendors, delivery_date date NOT NULL, do_number varchar(100), invoice_number varchar(100), status varchar(30) (on_time/late/partial/rejected), quality_issue boolean DEFAULT false, quality_notes text, received_by varchar(100), created_at timestamptz. Index: po_id, vendor_id, delivery_date.

**vendor_ratings** — id uuid PK, vendor_id uuid FK→vendors, period varchar(20) (e.g. 2024-Q1), delivery_score numeric(3,1), quality_score numeric(3,1), pricing_score numeric(3,1), responsiveness_score numeric(3,1), overall_score numeric(3,1), notes text, created_at timestamptz. UNIQUE(vendor_id, period). Index: vendor_id.

**price_lists** — id uuid PK, vendor_id uuid FK→vendors, item_code varchar(50), description varchar(500) NOT NULL, unit varchar(50), unit_price numeric(12,4) NOT NULL, currency varchar(10) DEFAULT 'MYR', min_order_qty numeric(12,3), effective_date date, expiry_date date, is_active boolean DEFAULT true, created_at timestamptz. Index: vendor_id, item_code, is_active.

**vendor_documents** — id uuid PK, vendor_id uuid FK→vendors, doc_type varchar(50) (ssm_cert/sst_cert/halal_cert/insurance/contract/other), doc_name varchar(255) NOT NULL, file_url text, expiry_date date, uploaded_at timestamptz. Index: vendor_id, doc_type.

**payment_records** — id uuid PK, po_id uuid FK→purchase_orders, vendor_id uuid FK→vendors, amount numeric(14,2) NOT NULL, payment_date date NOT NULL, payment_method varchar(50) (bank_transfer/cheque/online), reference_number varchar(100), notes text, created_at timestamptz. Index: po_id, vendor_id, payment_date.

## Core Features

### 1. Vendor Database (/vendors)
- Card grid showing company name, category badge, star rating, active PO count, YTD spend in RM
- Detail page: full company profile (SSM number, SST number, bank details), contacts list, document checklist, purchase history
- Create/edit form with onboarding checklist (SSM cert uploaded, bank details confirmed, primary contact added, credit limit set)
- Status management: active / inactive / blacklisted with reason field
- Preferred vendor flag (star icon) shown at top of selection lists

### 2. Purchase Order Management (/purchase-orders)
- Auto-generate PO number on creation (PO-YYYY-NNNN, zero-padded)
- Status timeline component: Draft → Sent → Acknowledged → Delivered → Invoiced → Paid
- Line items with item code lookup — autocomplete from price_lists, auto-fill unit price
- Approval workflow: POs above configurable threshold require manager approval before sending
- Export PO as PDF with company letterhead
- Payment due date auto-calculated from delivery date + payment terms days

### 3. Delivery Tracking
- Flag deliveries as on-time, late, partial, or rejected
- Auto-mark as late if actual_delivery_date > expected_delivery_date + 3 days
- Track delivered quantity per line item; show outstanding balance
- Quality issue flag with notes field

### 4. Vendor Performance Scoring
- Delivery score: auto-calculated = (on_time_count / total_deliveries) × 5
- Quality score and responsiveness score: manually entered by procurement staff each quarter
- Pricing score: calculated by comparing vendor's prices to category average
- Overall score formula: delivery 40% + quality 30% + pricing 20% + responsiveness 10%
- Radar chart (4 axes) on vendor detail page
- Alert icon on vendor card if overall score falls below 3.0

### 5. Cross-Vendor Price Comparison
- Search by item code or description; show a table of all active price_list entries across vendors
- Highlight lowest price in green; highlight highest overall-score vendor in yellow
- Price trend line chart over time for selected item

### 6. Payment Management & Aging Report
- Unpaid PO list sorted by payment_due_date ascending
- Aging buckets: Current / 1-30 days overdue / 31-60 days / 61-90 days / 90+ days
- Batch payment marking: select multiple POs, record payment in bulk
- Monthly vendor statement showing all POs, deliveries, and payments

### 7. Dashboard (/dashboard)
- KPI cards: Total Vendors, Active POs This Month, Pending Deliveries, Overdue count
- Stacked bar chart: monthly spend by vendor category (last 12 months)
- Top 10 vendors by YTD spend (horizontal bar chart)
- On-time delivery rate trend line (last 12 months)
- Payment aging donut chart
- Alert panel: overdue deliveries, expiring vendor documents (within 30 days), vendors rated below 3.0

## UI/UX Requirements
- Top nav: dark background (#0F172A), left: "{{company_name}} Procurement", right: Vendor Portal link
- Vendor cards: white background, subtle border, rounded corners, yellow (#FCD34D) star ratings
- Status badges: green=active, gray=inactive, red=blacklisted, amber=pending approval
- PO status timeline: horizontal stepper, current step highlighted in yellow
- Tables: striped rows, hover highlight, amounts right-aligned with RM prefix
- Mobile-friendly: vendor cards and PO list must be usable on phone screens
- Currency format: RM 1,234.56 (space after RM, comma thousands separator)
- Date format: DD/MM/YYYY throughout (Malaysian standard)
- Seed vendor categories on first run: {{vendor_categories}}
- Payment terms options: {{payment_terms}}

## Business Rules
- PO payment_due_date = actual_delivery_date + payment terms days (auto-calculated on delivery confirmation)
- Delivery is flagged late if actual_delivery_date > expected_delivery_date + 3 calendar days
- Preferred vendor suggestion: when creating a PO for a category, sort vendor dropdown with is_preferred=true and highest overall_score first
- Vendor overall score below 3.0 triggers a warning badge on the vendor card
- Onboarding checklist must be complete before a vendor can be set to active status
- PO approval threshold: configurable in settings (default RM 5,000)

## Deliverables
1. SQL migration file with all tables, indexes, and RLS policies
2. Supabase seed file with sample vendor categories and two demo vendors
3. Next.js App Router pages: /dashboard, /vendors, /vendors/[id], /vendors/new, /purchase-orders, /purchase-orders/[id], /purchase-orders/new, /price-comparison, /payments
4. Reusable components: VendorCard, POStatusTimeline, PerformanceRadarChart, PriceComparisonTable, PaymentAgingTable
5. Server Components for all data-fetching pages; Client Components only for interactive forms, charts, and copy actions
6. Start with vendor database and PO creation modules first. Validate those work end-to-end before building performance scoring and reporting.
preview_prompt: Generate a single HTML page showing a vendor management system. Show a dashboard with stats: Total Vendors 48, Active POs 12, Pending Deliveries 7, Overdue 2. Below show a vendor list table with columns: Company Name (e.g., 'Mega Supplies Sdn Bhd'), Contact Person, Category (Raw Materials/Packaging/Services), Rating (4.5/5 stars), Active POs, Total Spend YTD (RM), Payment Terms, Status badge. Show a vendor detail panel with recent POs, delivery performance chart (on-time %), and price comparison table for common items. Top nav with 'Vendor Portal'. Use dark nav + white content + yellow accents. Malaysian context: Sdn Bhd, RM, SST.

prompt_body:
你是一位全栈开发专家，专注于构建面向马来西亚中小企业的办公室管理系统。请帮我构建一套完整的会议室预约系统，取代现有的 WhatsApp 群组通知和门上便利贴，适用于「{{company_name}}」。

## 技术栈
- Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui 组件库
- Supabase（PostgreSQL + Auth + RLS 行级安全）
- Vercel 部署
- date-fns 日期处理，react-big-calendar 或自定义网格

## 数据库结构（Supabase / PostgreSQL）

### 表一：rooms（会议室）
sql
create table rooms (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,                        -- 例：董事会议室
  capacity int not null,                     -- 容纳人数
  floor text,                                -- 楼层，例：3楼
  description text,
  photo_url text,
  is_active boolean default true,
  has_projector boolean default false,
  has_whiteboard boolean default false,
  has_video_conf boolean default false,
  has_phone boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_rooms_is_active on rooms(is_active);


### 表二：bookings（预约记录）
sql
create table bookings (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  room_id uuid references rooms(id) on delete cascade,
  booker_name text not null,
  booker_email text not null,
  title text not null,                       -- 会议主题
  start_time timestamptz not null,
  end_time timestamptz not null,
  attendee_count int default 1,
  attendee_names text[],
  status text default 'confirmed'            -- confirmed / tentative / cancelled,
  recurrence text default 'none',            -- none / daily / weekly / monthly
  recurrence_end_date date,
  parent_booking_id uuid references bookings(id),  -- 关联重复预约父记录
  checked_in_at timestamptz,
  notes text,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_bookings_room_id on bookings(room_id);
create index idx_bookings_start_time on bookings(start_time);
create index idx_bookings_status on bookings(status);
create index idx_bookings_booker_email on bookings(booker_email);


### 表三：visitors（访客预登记）
sql
create table visitors (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  booking_id uuid references bookings(id) on delete cascade,
  name text not null,
  company text,
  email text,
  phone text,
  id_number text,                            -- 身份证 / 护照
  checked_in_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_visitors_booking_id on visitors(booking_id);


### 表四：booking_rules（预约规则）
sql
create table booking_rules (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  max_duration_hours int default 4,          -- 单次最长预约时长
  advance_booking_days int default 30,       -- 最多提前多少天预约
  no_show_release_minutes int default 15,    -- 无人签到后自动释放
  allow_recurring boolean default true,
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);


### RLS 安全策略
- rooms 表：anon 角色可 SELECT（is_active = true）
- bookings 表：anon 可 INSERT 和 SELECT；UPDATE / DELETE 限 authenticated 或本人（by booker_email）
- visitors 表：与 bookings 同策略
- 所有策略中使用 `(select auth.uid())` 而非直接 `auth.uid()` 以避免逐行函数调用

## 核心功能

### 1. 周视图日历网格
- 横轴：时间段（{{operating_hours}}，每30分钟一格）
- 纵轴：会议室列表（{{rooms}}）
- 颜色区分：蓝色 = 已确认，黄色 = 暂定，灰色 = 已封锁，绿色 = 空闲
- 悬停显示：会议主题、预约人、时段、人数
- 点击空白时段直接打开「新建预约」表单，自动带入该房间和时间

### 2. 预约创建与冲突检测
- 表单字段：会议室、日期、开始/结束时间、主题、预约人姓名和电邮、参与人数、设备需求
- 提交前查询冲突：`select count(*) from bookings where room_id = $1 and status != 'cancelled' and start_time < $end and end_time > $start`
- 若有冲突，即时提示并建议其他空闲时段（同楼层 / 相近容量）
- 最长预约时间限制：{{booking_rules}} 小时

### 3. 会议室筛选
- 按容量筛选（最少人数）
- 按设备需求（投影仪、白板、视频会议、电话）
- 按楼层
- 「立即可用」快捷筛选（当前时刻起1小时内有空档）

### 4. 重复预约
- 支持每日、每周、每月重复
- 设置重复结束日期
- 提交时批量检测所有重复时段是否有冲突，列出冲突清单请用户确认
- 修改时提示：「仅修改此次」或「修改全部重复」

### 5. 门口平板展示视图（Kiosk Mode）
- 路由：`/room/[room-id]/display`
- 全屏大字显示：当前会议主题、预约人、剩余时间进度条
- 下一场预约信息
- 若当前空闲显示绿色「Available」并展示今日后续预约列表
- 每60秒自动刷新，无需登录

### 6. 访客预登记
- 预约时可添加外部访客（姓名、公司、联系方式）
- 前台可扫码或按姓名查找，标记访客已到场
- 访客签到记录保留供安全审计

### 7. 设备预订
- 预约时勾选所需设备（投影仪、白板、视频会议设备、电话）
- 若会议室本身不含该设备，系统检查可移动设备库存并预留

### 8. 取消与修改
- 任何人凭预约编号或邮件链接取消
- 修改操作需重新检测冲突
- 取消后发送邮件通知预约人和参与者（使用 Supabase Edge Function + Resend）

### 9. 自动释放（No-Show）
- Supabase Edge Function 定时任务（每5分钟）：扫描已开始但未签到的预约
- 超过 {{booking_rules}} 分钟（默认15分钟）无签到 → 状态改为 `cancelled`，会议室立即释放
- 通知原预约人：「您的预约因未签到已自动取消」

## UI/UX 设计

### 颜色方案
- 导航栏：深海军蓝 #0F172A
- 主背景：白色，卡片使用浅灰边框
- 黄色强调 #FCD34D：CTA 按钮、已选状态、今日高亮
- 字体：Inter（英文）+ Noto Sans SC（中文）

### 页面结构
- `/`：首页 → 跳转 `/library`（本项目）
- `/booking`：主日历视图 + 顶部统计（当前可用房间数、今日预约数、即将开始场次）
- `/booking/new`：新建预约表单
- `/booking/[id]`：预约详情 + 签到 + 访客管理
- `/room/[id]/display`：门口展示 Kiosk 视图
- `/admin`：管理后台（需认证）
- `/admin/rooms`：会议室管理（增删改、上传照片）
- `/admin/analytics`：使用率统计仪表盘

### 响应式
- 桌面端：侧边栏筛选 + 完整日历网格
- 移动端：垂直列表视图，按日期折叠，底部浮动「立即预约」按钮

## 仪表盘统计

实现 `/admin/analytics` 页面，显示：
- 各会议室使用率（已预约时长 / 总可用时长）
- 每周峰值时段热力图
- 使用最多 / 最少的会议室排名
- 平均会议时长
- No-Show 率
- 数据来源：Supabase 聚合查询，使用 `Promise.all` 并行请求，避免瀑布加载

## 业务规则总结
1. 禁止双重预约（后端 constraint + 前端实时检测）
2. 单次预约最长 {{booking_rules}} 小时
3. 最多提前30天预约
4. 无签到15分钟后自动释放
5. 重复预约逐一检测冲突
6. 取消须提前至少30分钟（管理员除外）

请先生成数据库 migration SQL，然后构建周视图日历网格组件，再实现预约创建表单和冲突检测逻辑。
prompt_body_en:
You are a full-stack developer specialising in office management systems for Malaysian SMEs. Build a complete Meeting Room Booking System for "{{company_name}}" that replaces WhatsApp-based room booking and sticky notes on doors.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui component library
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Row Level Security)
- Vercel deployment
- date-fns for date handling, custom calendar grid component

## Database Schema (Supabase / PostgreSQL)

### Table 1: rooms
sql
create table rooms (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  name text not null,
  capacity int not null,
  floor text,
  description text,
  photo_url text,
  is_active boolean default true,
  has_projector boolean default false,
  has_whiteboard boolean default false,
  has_video_conf boolean default false,
  has_phone boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_rooms_is_active on rooms(is_active);


### Table 2: bookings
sql
create table bookings (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  room_id uuid references rooms(id) on delete cascade,
  booker_name text not null,
  booker_email text not null,
  title text not null,
  start_time timestamptz not null,
  end_time timestamptz not null,
  attendee_count int default 1,
  attendee_names text[],
  status text default 'confirmed',           -- confirmed / tentative / cancelled
  recurrence text default 'none',            -- none / daily / weekly / monthly
  recurrence_end_date date,
  parent_booking_id uuid references bookings(id),
  checked_in_at timestamptz,
  notes text,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_bookings_room_id on bookings(room_id);
create index idx_bookings_start_time on bookings(start_time);
create index idx_bookings_status on bookings(status);
create index idx_bookings_booker_email on bookings(booker_email);


### Table 3: visitors
sql
create table visitors (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  booking_id uuid references bookings(id) on delete cascade,
  name text not null,
  company text,
  email text,
  phone text,
  id_number text,
  checked_in_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_visitors_booking_id on visitors(booking_id);


### Table 4: booking_rules
sql
create table booking_rules (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  max_duration_hours int default 4,
  advance_booking_days int default 30,
  no_show_release_minutes int default 15,
  allow_recurring boolean default true,
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);


### RLS Policies
- rooms: anon role can SELECT where is_active = true
- bookings: anon can INSERT and SELECT; UPDATE/DELETE restricted to authenticated users or the original booker matched by booker_email
- visitors: same policy as bookings
- Always wrap auth checks as (select auth.uid()) — never bare auth.uid() — to prevent per-row function calls

## Core Features to Build

### 1. Weekly Calendar Grid
- X-axis: time slots across {{operating_hours}}, 30-minute intervals
- Y-axis: room rows — {{rooms}}
- Colour coding: blue = confirmed, yellow = tentative, grey = blocked, green = available
- Hover tooltip: meeting title, booker name, time range, attendee count
- Click any empty slot to open New Booking form pre-filled with that room and time
- Navigation arrows for previous/next week, Today button

### 2. Booking Creation with Conflict Detection
- Form fields: room selector, date, start/end time, meeting title, booker name and email, attendee count, equipment checklist, notes
- Before submit, run conflict query: SELECT count(*) FROM bookings WHERE room_id = $1 AND status != 'cancelled' AND start_time < $end_time AND end_time > $start_time
- If conflict found: show alert and suggest alternative available rooms with similar capacity on the same floor
- Enforce max duration rule from booking_rules (default {{booking_rules}} hours)
- Validate end_time > start_time and both within operating hours

### 3. Room Filtering
- Filter panel: minimum capacity slider, equipment checkboxes (projector, whiteboard, video conferencing, phone), floor selector
- Quick filter: "Available Now" shows rooms free for the next 60 minutes
- Filter state persisted in URL search params for shareability

### 4. Recurring Bookings
- Recurrence options: none, daily, weekly, monthly
- Set recurrence end date
- On submit: batch-check every occurrence for conflicts, display a conflict summary list and ask user to confirm or skip conflicting dates
- On edit: prompt "Edit this booking only" or "Edit all future bookings in this series"
- Store series link via parent_booking_id

### 5. Door Display Tablet View (Kiosk Mode)
- Route: /room/[room-id]/display
- Full-screen, large typography layout — no login required
- Show current booking: title, booker, time remaining as a progress bar
- Show next booking: title, start time, booker
- If room is free: green background, "Available" in large text, list of today's remaining bookings
- Auto-refresh every 60 seconds using a lightweight polling or Supabase Realtime subscription
- Designed for 10-inch landscape tablet mounted beside the door

### 6. Visitor Pre-Registration
- When creating a booking, add external visitors: name, company, contact number
- Reception staff can search visitors by name or booking ID on arrival day
- Mark visitor as checked in — record checked_in_at timestamp
- Visitor log retained for security audit purposes

### 7. Equipment Reservation
- Equipment checkboxes tied to each booking
- If the selected room lacks a requested item, system checks movable equipment inventory and reserves it
- Equipment availability shown as part of room filter results

### 8. Cancellation and Modification with Notification
- Anyone can cancel via booking ID or email magic link (no login required for self-service)
- Modification re-triggers conflict detection
- On cancel or modify: send email to booker and all listed attendees via Supabase Edge Function + Resend
- Cancellation must be at least 30 minutes before start time (admins can override)

### 9. Auto-Release (No-Show)
- Supabase Edge Function on a cron schedule (every 5 minutes): scan bookings that have started but have no checked_in_at value
- If start_time + no_show_release_minutes < now(): set status = 'cancelled', free the room immediately
- Send notification email to booker: "Your booking was auto-released due to no check-in"
- Log the auto-release event for analytics

## UI/UX Design Specifications

### Colour Palette
- Navigation bar: dark navy #0F172A, white text
- Page background: white; card borders: slate-200
- Yellow accent #FCD34D: primary CTA buttons, selected state highlight, today column indicator
- Status pills: blue-100/blue-700 (confirmed), yellow-100/yellow-700 (tentative), slate-100/slate-500 (cancelled)
- Typography: Inter for English/numbers, Noto Sans SC for Chinese labels

### Page Structure
- /booking: main weekly calendar view + top stats bar (Rooms Available Now X/Y, Today's Bookings N, Starting Soon N)
- /booking/new: full booking form with live conflict check
- /booking/[id]: booking detail, check-in button, visitor list, cancel/edit actions
- /room/[id]/display: kiosk door display view
- /admin: protected admin area (Supabase Auth)
- /admin/rooms: room CRUD, photo upload via Supabase Storage
- /admin/analytics: utilisation dashboard

### Responsive Behaviour
- Desktop (lg+): sidebar filter panel + full calendar grid
- Mobile: vertical list grouped by date, collapsible day sections, floating "Book Now" button fixed at bottom

## Analytics Dashboard (/admin/analytics)

Build with parallel Supabase queries using Promise.all — no sequential waterfalls. Display:
- Room utilisation rate per room: booked hours / total available hours this month (as percentage bar)
- Weekly peak hours heatmap (hour of day × day of week, intensity = booking count)
- Most used and least used room ranking
- Average meeting duration
- No-show rate (auto-released bookings / total bookings)
- All charts use Recharts or shadcn/ui chart primitives

## Business Rules Summary
1. No double-booking enforced at database level with a unique partial index and at the API layer
2. Maximum single booking duration: {{booking_rules}} hours (read from booking_rules table)
3. Bookings allowed up to 30 days in advance
4. Auto-release rooms after 15 minutes of no check-in
5. Recurring bookings checked for conflicts on every occurrence before saving
6. Cancellations must be at least 30 minutes before start (admin bypass allowed)
7. Operating hours: {{operating_hours}} — reject bookings outside this window

## Build Order
1. Generate full database migration SQL with all tables, indexes, and RLS policies
2. Build the weekly calendar grid component (rooms × time slots, colour-coded, hover tooltips)
3. Implement the booking creation form with real-time conflict detection
4. Add room filtering sidebar
5. Build the door display kiosk view
6. Add visitor pre-registration to the booking form
7. Implement recurring booking logic
8. Build the admin analytics dashboard

Start with step 1 (migration SQL) and step 2 (calendar grid) in the same response so I can see the data model and core UI together.

Color-coded bookings fill time blocks (blue for confirmed, yellow for tentative, gray for blocked). Show booking details on hover: 'Q3 Budget Review - David Lim - 10:00-11:30 - 8 attendees'. Include a side panel with 'New Booking' form showing room selector, date/time pickers, attendees, and equipment checklist (projector, whiteboard, video conferencing). Top stats: Rooms Available Now 2/4, Today's Bookings 8, Upcoming 3. Top nav with 'Room Booking'. Use dark nav + white content + yellow accents.

title_zh: 问卷调查与反馈收集工具
subtitle: Build a customizable survey builder with real-time analytics, QR code sharing, and response management
boss_tip: Start with the survey builder and the public response form — those are the two most important pieces. Add analytics charts and export features after surveys are collecting data.
prompt_body_en:
You are an expert full-stack developer building a Survey & Feedback Collection Tool for {company_name}, a Malaysian SME. This tool replaces Google Forms, SurveyMonkey, and Typeform with a fully owned, self-hosted solution.

The business needs to run: {survey_types}. Each survey supports up to {max_questions} questions using these question types: {question_types}.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router) with TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (new-york style, slate base, yellow #FCD34D accent)
- Supabase (Postgres + Auth + RLS + Realtime)
- @dnd-kit/core for drag-and-drop question reordering
- recharts for analytics charts
- qrcode.react for QR code generation
- react-hook-form + zod for form validation
- xlsx (SheetJS) for Excel export
- Vercel hosting

## Database Schema

Create the following Supabase tables:

sql
-- Surveys table
create table surveys (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  created_by uuid references auth.users(id),
  title text not null,
  description text,
  status text not null default 'draft' check (status in ('draft','active','closed','scheduled')),
  theme jsonb default '{"primary_color": "#FCD34D", "logo_url": null, "bg_color": "#FFFFFF"}'::jsonb,
  settings jsonb default '{"one_response_per_device": true, "show_progress_bar": true, "randomize_questions": false, "response_limit": null}'::jsonb,
  opens_at timestamptz,
  closes_at timestamptz,
  thank_you_message text default 'Thank you for your feedback!',
  thank_you_redirect_url text,
  created_at timestamptz default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_surveys_status on surveys(status);
create index idx_surveys_created_by on surveys(created_by);

-- Questions table
create table questions (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  survey_id uuid not null references surveys(id) on delete cascade,
  type text not null check (type in ('single_choice','multiple_choice','rating','text','nps','matrix','date','email','phone')),
  text text not null,
  description text,
  options jsonb,
  matrix_rows jsonb,
  matrix_cols jsonb,
  required boolean default false,
  display_order integer not null default 0,
  conditional_logic jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_questions_survey_id on questions(survey_id);
create index idx_questions_order on questions(survey_id, display_order);

-- Responses table
create table responses (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  survey_id uuid not null references surveys(id) on delete cascade,
  respondent_info jsonb,
  device_fingerprint text,
  ip_address text,
  user_agent text,
  share_method text,
  completed boolean default false,
  submitted_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_responses_survey_id on responses(survey_id);
create index idx_responses_submitted_at on responses(survey_id, submitted_at);
create index idx_responses_fingerprint on responses(survey_id, device_fingerprint);

-- Answers table
create table answers (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  response_id uuid not null references responses(id) on delete cascade,
  question_id uuid not null references questions(id) on delete cascade,
  value text,
  value_array jsonb,
  value_number numeric,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_answers_response_id on answers(response_id);
create index idx_answers_question_id on answers(question_id);

-- Survey shares table
create table survey_shares (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  survey_id uuid not null references surveys(id) on delete cascade,
  method text check (method in ('link','qr_code','email','embed')),
  url text,
  qr_code_data text,
  click_count integer default 0,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_survey_shares_survey_id on survey_shares(survey_id);


Enable RLS. Public (anon) can SELECT active surveys, INSERT responses and answers. Authenticated admins can do full CRUD. Block duplicate responses using device_fingerprint check in a Postgres function.

## Application Structure


src/app/
  (public)/
    s/[survey-id]/page.tsx         # Public response form
    s/[survey-id]/thank-you/page.tsx
  (admin)/
    admin/
      layout.tsx                   # Auth guard
      page.tsx                     # Survey list dashboard
      surveys/new/page.tsx         # Create survey
      surveys/[id]/builder/page.tsx  # Drag-and-drop builder
      surveys/[id]/results/page.tsx  # Analytics dashboard
      surveys/[id]/responses/page.tsx # Individual responses
src/components/
  builder/
    SurveyBuilder.tsx              # Main builder (Client Component)
    QuestionList.tsx               # DnD sortable list
    QuestionCard.tsx               # Individual question editor
    QuestionTypeSelector.tsx       # Type picker modal
    SurveyPreview.tsx              # Live preview panel
  response-form/
    SurveyForm.tsx                 # Public respondent form
    QuestionRenderer.tsx           # Renders each question type
    NPSQuestion.tsx                # 0-10 NPS scale
    RatingQuestion.tsx             # Star rating
    MatrixQuestion.tsx             # Grid question
  analytics/
    ResponseOverTimeChart.tsx      # Line chart
    NPSGauge.tsx                   # NPS score gauge
    QuestionBreakdown.tsx          # Per-question stats
    SentimentBadge.tsx             # Text sentiment label
  SurveySharePanel.tsx             # QR + link + embed sharing


## Core Features to Implement

### 1. Drag-and-Drop Survey Builder
Use @dnd-kit/core with vertical sortable list. Each question card shows: question text, type badge, required toggle, edit/delete icons, drag handle. Clicking a question opens an inline editor panel on the right. Support reordering via drag; persist new display_order to Supabase on drop.

### 2. Question Types
Implement all of: Single Choice (radio buttons + add option), Multiple Choice (checkboxes), Rating (1-5 stars with label customization), Text (short/long toggle), NPS (0-10 horizontal scale with Detractor/Passive/Promoter labels), Matrix (row/column grid), Email, Phone. Each type has its own editor UI and preview renderer.

### 3. Live Preview Panel
Split-screen layout: left 55% is the editor, right 45% is a live preview frame. Preview updates instantly as the user edits. Preview shows the survey exactly as respondents will see it, using the configured theme colors. Add a mobile/desktop toggle button to simulate different viewports.

### 4. Public Response Form
Route: /s/[survey-id]. No authentication required. Before showing the form, check: survey status is 'active', current time is within opens_at/closes_at window, device has not already submitted (check cookie + device fingerprint). Show a branded header with company logo and survey title. Render questions in order, applying conditional logic. Show progress bar. On submit, write response + answers to Supabase in a single transaction using a Server Action. Redirect to /s/[survey-id]/thank-you.

### 5. QR Code Generation
In the Share panel, generate a QR code using qrcode.react pointing to the public survey URL. Provide a Download PNG button. Also show an embed code snippet (<iframe>) and a copy-link button. Track share method in survey_shares table.

### 6. Analytics Dashboard
For each active/closed survey show:
- Summary cards: Total Responses, Completion Rate, Avg. Time to Complete, Response Rate vs. Target
- Line chart: responses per day over time (recharts LineChart)
- Per-question breakdown: for choice questions show a horizontal bar chart with counts and percentages; for rating questions show average score + star distribution; for NPS show gauge with Promoters/Passives/Detractors breakdown and calculated NPS score (% Promoters - % Detractors × 100); for text responses show response list with basic keyword frequency
- NPS formula: NPS = (Promoters% - Detractors%) where Promoters = scores 9-10, Detractors = scores 0-6

### 7. Response Export
Export button downloads all responses as an Excel file using SheetJS. Sheet 1: summary stats. Sheet 2: raw response data with one row per response and one column per question. Include respondent_info fields and submitted_at timestamp.

### 8. Survey Templates
Pre-load 5 templates in the new survey flow: Customer Satisfaction (CSAT), Net Promoter Score (NPS), Employee Satisfaction (eNPS), Event Feedback, Product Feedback. Each template pre-populates questions. User selects a template card then customizes.

### 9. Conditional Logic
For each question, allow adding a condition: show this question only if [previous question] [equals / contains / is greater than] [value]. Store as JSON in questions.conditional_logic: { depends_on_question_id, operator, value }. Evaluate in QuestionRenderer on the client side.

### 10. Survey Scheduling
In survey settings, allow setting opens_at and closes_at datetime fields. Show a status badge: Draft, Scheduled, Active, Closed. The public form respects these dates and shows appropriate messages ("This survey has not opened yet" / "This survey is now closed").

## UI/UX Guidelines
- Admin nav: dark navy (#0F172A) sidebar with survey list, white content area
- Yellow (#FCD34D) for primary CTA buttons (Publish Survey, Copy Link, Export)
- shadcn/ui Card for question cards, Table for response list, Badge for question types and status
- Mobile-first public form: max-w-2xl centered, generous padding, large touch targets for choice options
- Progress bar at top of public form showing % questions answered
- Skeleton loaders for analytics charts while data loads
- Toast notifications (sonner) for save confirmations, publish success, export complete

## Business Rules
- One response per device: set a cookie `survey_{id}_submitted=true` after submit; also check device_fingerprint server-side
- Required questions block form progression if unanswered
- Response limit: if settings.response_limit is set and responses >= limit, close survey automatically via Supabase Edge Function
- Admins can re-open closed surveys and reset individual responses
- Survey URLs are permanent even after closing

## Deliverables
Build the complete application. Start with: (1) database schema and RLS policies, (2) the survey builder page, (3) the public response form, (4) the analytics dashboard. Make sure each is fully functional before moving to the next.
prompt_body:
你是一位全栈开发专家，正在为{company_name}（马来西亚中小企业）构建一套「问卷调查与反馈收集工具」。这套系统将取代Google Forms、SurveyMonkey和Typeform，让老板完全掌控自己的调查数据。

业务需要支持以下调查类型：{survey_types}。每份问卷最多可包含{max_questions}道题目，支持的题型包括：{question_types}。

## 技术栈
- Next.js 14（App Router）+ TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui（new-york 风格，slate 底色，黄色 #FCD34D 强调色）
- Supabase（Postgres + Auth + RLS + Realtime）
- @dnd-kit/core 实现题目拖拽排序
- recharts 绘制数据分析图表
- qrcode.react 生成二维码
- react-hook-form + zod 表单验证
- xlsx（SheetJS）导出 Excel
- Vercel 部署

## 数据库结构

在 Supabase 中创建以下数据表：

sql
-- 问卷主表
create table surveys (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  created_by uuid references auth.users(id),
  title text not null,
  description text,
  status text not null default 'draft' check (status in ('draft','active','closed','scheduled')),
  theme jsonb default '{"primary_color": "#FCD34D", "logo_url": null, "bg_color": "#FFFFFF"}'::jsonb,
  settings jsonb default '{"one_response_per_device": true, "show_progress_bar": true, "randomize_questions": false, "response_limit": null}'::jsonb,
  opens_at timestamptz,
  closes_at timestamptz,
  thank_you_message text default '感谢您的反馈！',
  thank_you_redirect_url text,
  created_at timestamptz default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_surveys_status on surveys(status);
create index idx_surveys_created_by on surveys(created_by);

-- 题目表
create table questions (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  survey_id uuid not null references surveys(id) on delete cascade,
  type text not null check (type in ('single_choice','multiple_choice','rating','text','nps','matrix','date','email','phone')),
  text text not null,
  description text,
  options jsonb,
  matrix_rows jsonb,
  matrix_cols jsonb,
  required boolean default false,
  display_order integer not null default 0,
  conditional_logic jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_questions_survey_id on questions(survey_id);
create index idx_questions_order on questions(survey_id, display_order);

-- 答卷表
create table responses (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  survey_id uuid not null references surveys(id) on delete cascade,
  respondent_info jsonb,
  device_fingerprint text,
  ip_address text,
  user_agent text,
  share_method text,
  completed boolean default false,
  submitted_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_responses_survey_id on responses(survey_id);
create index idx_responses_submitted_at on responses(survey_id, submitted_at);
create index idx_responses_fingerprint on responses(survey_id, device_fingerprint);

-- 答案表
create table answers (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  response_id uuid not null references responses(id) on delete cascade,
  question_id uuid not null references questions(id) on delete cascade,
  value text,
  value_array jsonb,
  value_number numeric,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_answers_response_id on answers(response_id);
create index idx_answers_question_id on answers(question_id);

-- 问卷分享记录表
create table survey_shares (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  survey_id uuid not null references surveys(id) on delete cascade,
  method text check (method in ('link','qr_code','email','embed')),
  url text,
  qr_code_data text,
  click_count integer default 0,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);
create index idx_survey_shares_survey_id on survey_shares(survey_id);


开启 RLS。匿名用户（anon）可以 SELECT 状态为 active 的问卷，可以 INSERT 答卷和答案。已登录管理员可以做全部 CRUD。通过 Postgres 函数检查 device_fingerprint 防止重复提交。

## 应用目录结构


src/app/
  (public)/
    s/[survey-id]/page.tsx            # 公开答题页
    s/[survey-id]/thank-you/page.tsx  # 提交感谢页
  (admin)/
    admin/
      layout.tsx                      # 登录验证
      page.tsx                        # 问卷列表
      surveys/new/page.tsx            # 新建问卷
      surveys/[id]/builder/page.tsx   # 拖拽编辑器
      surveys/[id]/results/page.tsx   # 数据分析
      surveys/[id]/responses/page.tsx # 答卷详情
src/components/
  builder/
    SurveyBuilder.tsx           # 编辑器主体（Client Component）
    QuestionList.tsx            # DnD 排序列表
    QuestionCard.tsx            # 单题编辑卡片
    QuestionTypeSelector.tsx    # 题型选择弹窗
    SurveyPreview.tsx           # 实时预览面板
  response-form/
    SurveyForm.tsx              # 公开答题表单
    QuestionRenderer.tsx        # 各题型渲染器
    NPSQuestion.tsx             # 0-10 NPS 量表
    RatingQuestion.tsx          # 星级评分
    MatrixQuestion.tsx          # 矩阵题
  analytics/
    ResponseOverTimeChart.tsx   # 折线图（每日回复数）
    NPSGauge.tsx                # NPS 仪表盘
    QuestionBreakdown.tsx       # 按题分析
    SentimentBadge.tsx          # 文字情感标签
  SurveySharePanel.tsx          # 二维码+链接+嵌入分享


## 核心功能详细说明

### 1. 拖拽问卷编辑器
使用 @dnd-kit/core 实现纵向可排序列表。每张题目卡片显示：题目文字、题型标签、必填开关、编辑/删除图标、拖拽手柄。点击题目卡片后，右侧弹出内联编辑面板。拖拽完成后，将新的 display_order 保存到 Supabase。

### 2. 支持的题型
实现以下全部题型：单选题（单选按钮 + 添加选项）、多选题（复选框）、评分题（1-5 星，可自定义标签）、文本题（单行/多行切换）、NPS 题（0-10 横向量表，显示「批评者/被动者/推荐者」标签）、矩阵题（行列表格）、邮箱、电话号码。每种题型有独立的编辑界面和预览渲染组件。

### 3. 实时预览面板
左右分屏布局：左侧 55% 为编辑区，右侧 45% 为实时预览区。编辑内容即时同步到预览。预览效果与受访者实际看到的完全一致，并应用问卷主题颜色。在预览区顶部加入「手机/电脑」切换按钮，模拟不同设备视图。

### 4. 公开答题页
路由：/s/[survey-id]，无需登录。显示表单前先检查：问卷状态是否为 active、当前时间是否在 opens_at 至 closes_at 范围内、该设备是否已提交过（检查 cookie 和 device_fingerprint）。展示带公司 logo 和问卷标题的品牌化页头。按顺序渲染题目并执行条件逻辑。顶部显示进度条。提交时通过 Server Action 将答卷和答案一次性写入 Supabase，然后跳转到感谢页。

### 5. 二维码生成
在「分享」面板中，用 qrcode.react 生成指向公开答题链接的二维码，并提供「下载 PNG」按钮。二维码可以打印在小票、桌牌或海报上，方便顾客扫码作答。同时展示 `<iframe>` 嵌入代码和「复制链接」按钮。在 survey_shares 表记录分享方式。

### 6. 数据分析仪表盘
每份激活/已关闭的问卷展示以下内容：
- 汇总卡片：总回复数、完成率、平均用时、已达目标回复数比例
- 折线图：每日回复数趋势（recharts LineChart）
- 按题分析：选择题显示横向条形图（数量+百分比）；评分题显示平均分 + 星级分布；NPS 题显示仪表盘（推荐者/被动者/批评者比例）及 NPS 得分（推荐者% 减去批评者%）；文本题显示答案列表及关键词词频
- NPS 计算公式：NPS = （推荐者% - 批评者%）× 100，其中推荐者 = 9-10 分，批评者 = 0-6 分

### 7. 导出答卷
导出按钮使用 SheetJS 下载 Excel 文件。第一张表：汇总统计；第二张表：原始答卷数据，每行一条答卷，每列一道题，包含受访者信息和提交时间。

### 8. 问卷模板
在新建问卷流程中提供 5 个预设模板：客户满意度（CSAT）、净推荐值（NPS）、员工满意度（eNPS）、活动反馈、产品反馈。每个模板预填好常用题目，老板选择模板后直接修改即可使用。

### 9. 条件逻辑
为每道题支持添加显示条件：「仅当 [某道题] [等于/包含/大于] [某值] 时显示本题」。存储格式为 JSON：{ depends_on_question_id, operator, value }。在 QuestionRenderer 客户端组件中实时计算是否显示该题。

### 10. 问卷定时开关
在问卷设置中提供「开始时间」和「结束时间」日期选择器。状态标签显示为：草稿、待发布、进行中、已关闭。公开答题页根据时间自动显示相应提示（「问卷尚未开放」或「问卷已结束，感谢您的关注」）。

## 界面设计规范
- 管理后台导航：深海军蓝（#0F172A）侧边栏 + 白色主内容区
- 黄色（#FCD34D）用于主操作按钮：「发布问卷」「复制链接」「导出数据」
- 题目卡片使用 shadcn/ui Card 组件，答卷列表使用 Table，题型和状态用 Badge 标识
- 公开答题页移动端优先：最大宽度 max-w-2xl 居中，充足内边距，选项触控区域足够大
- 答题页顶部显示进度条，提示已完成的题目百分比
- 数据图表加载时显示 Skeleton 占位符
- 使用 Sonner Toast 通知：保存成功、发布成功、导出完成

## 业务规则
- 每台设备只能提交一次：提交后设置 cookie「survey_{id}_submitted=true」，同时在服务端校验 device_fingerprint
- 必填题未作答时阻止提交，并高亮提示
- 回复上限：若 settings.response_limit 已设置且答卷数量达到上限，通过 Supabase Edge Function 自动关闭问卷
- 管理员可以重新开放已关闭的问卷，或删除单条答卷
- 问卷链接永久有效，即使问卷关闭后链接仍可访问（显示「已关闭」提示）

## 交付顺序
请按以下顺序依次构建，确保每个模块完整可用后再进行下一步：
1. 数据库结构及 RLS 权限策略
2. 拖拽问卷编辑器（含实时预览）
3. 公开答题页（含提交逻辑和感谢页）
4. 数据分析仪表盘（含图表和导出功能）

Right side shows a live preview of the survey form as respondents would see it, styled with company branding. Below the builder show a results dashboard with a pie chart for multiple choice, average rating display (4.2/5 stars), and NPS score gauge. Top nav with 'Survey Builder'. Use dark nav + white content + yellow accents.
